name: Grandfather's Gardeners
inspire: After an Action step, if a friendly fighter is vulnerable, Inspire that fighter.

abilities.name: Blooming Plague
abilities.rulesText: Where a friendly fighter has the Gardener ({icon:gardener}) runemark instead of a characteristic, {icon:gardener} is equal to the current space on your tracker.

abilities.name: Imperturbable
abilities.rulesText: No more than 2 damage can be inflicted on Uninspired friendly fighters in the same turn.

abilities.name: Reap a Harvest
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after placing your token on this space. Pick a friendly fighter. Heal that fighter.

abilities.name: Tracker
abilities.rulesText:
In the Muster Warbands step of 'Setting Up', place a generic token on the 'Start' space of this warscroll's tracker. Advance that token 1 space clockwise immediately:

• after your turn.

• after damage is inflicted on a friendly fighter.

• after your turn if your warband holds more treasure tokens than your opponent.
